h1: How to Place PCBWay Orders from Online 3D Viewer Directly？

headings.text: How to Place PCBWay Orders from Online 3D Viewer Directly？

sections.heading: How to Place PCBWay Orders from Online 3D Viewer Directly？
sections.text: Blog > How to Place PCBWay Orders from Online 3D Viewer Directly？ How to Place PCBWay Orders from Online 3D Viewer Directly？ by: PCBWay Jan 13,2023 10740 Views 0 Comments Posted in Help Center Online 3D Viewer ( https://3dviewer.net/ ) is popular among 3D Printing hobbyists for its simple page and excellent viewing capabilities. For the convenience of all, we have good news: PCBWay has partnered with Online 3D Viewer to include a built-in plugin that allows designers to place PCBWay orders directly from the viewer. This article is going to show the steps: 1. Enter Online 3D Viewer and open your file. 2. Find the icon indicated by the arrow and click it. 3. Click Print and enter PCBWay. 4. S...
